merged_events.event_description: The United States established diplomatic relations and opened the American Embassy in Paramaribo, with Robert L. Flanagin as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The United States Diplomatic relations and the American Embassy in Paramaribo were established on November 25, 1975, with Robert L. Flanagin as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1975-11-25) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms establishment of diplomatic relations and opening of the American Embassy in Paramaribo.
